children.heading: Study of barriers and environmental and safety aspects
children.label: a Study of barriers and environmental and safety aspects

children.text: technical, economic, financial, legal, regulatory, institutional, or other barriers to coalbed methane recovery, and of policy options for eliminating such barriers; and
the environmental and safety aspects of flaring coalbed methane liberated from coal mines.

children.heading: Information dissemination
children.label: b Information dissemination
children.text: Beginning one year after , the Secretary, in consultation with the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency and the Secretary of the Interior, shall disseminate to the public information on state-of-the-art coalbed methane recovery techniques, including information on costs and benefits.October 24, 1992

children.heading: Demonstration and commercial application program
children.label: c Demonstration and commercial application program

children.text: gas enrichment technologies for enriching medium-quality methane recovered from coal mines to pipeline quality;
technologies to use mine ventilation air in nearby power generation facilities, including gas turbines, internal combustion engines, or other coal fired powerplants;
technologies for cofiring methane recovered from mines, including methane from ventilation systems and degasification systems, together with coal in conventional or clean coal technology boilers; and
other technologies for producing and using methane from coal mines that the Secretary considers appropriate.
